notes: All 3 phase-2 tasks (mxdx-awe.9, .10, .11) executed and closed on branch brains/rust-p2p-interactive. T-20 (mxdx-awe.9, commit 90f368c): crates/mxdx-p2p/src/turn.rs implements TurnCredentials struct (uris/username/password/ttl/fetched_at) with expires_at()/refresh_at()/is_expired(), redacted Debug (password/username/uris never printed), Drop zeroizes secrets, no Clone, no Serialize. fetch_turn_credentials(homeserver, token) hits GET /_matrix/client/v3/voip/turnServer via reqwest with redirect::Policy::none() + 10s timeout + scheme gate (https always ok; http only for loopback localhost/127.0.0.1/::1 mirroring packages/core/turn-credentials.js LOOPBACK_HOSTS). Graceful Ok(None) on 4xx/5xx, invalid JSON, empty uris per storm §4.1. Wasm stub returns TurnError::WasmUnsupported (Phase 8 implements real fetch). 16 native unit tests pass (mockito-based HTTP, Debug redaction, scheme gate, 404/500/empty-uris/invalid-json/redirect-refused). T-21 (mxdx-awe.10, commit cfa03e0): TurnRefreshOutcome enum {Refreshed(TurnCredentials), RetryPending, Expired}; TurnRefreshTask with spawn(initial, homeserver, token) -> (task, mpsc::Receiver<Outcome>), trigger_refresh_now() for reconnect-pending serialization per storm §2.4, shutdown() clean-cancel, Drop best-effort. Loop scheduling uses tokio::time::Instant (projected from seed TurnCredentials' SystemTime on entry) so tests run in virtual time via start_paused+advance+yield_now. Exponential backoff schedule [5,10,20,40,60] capped at hard_expiry (seed.expires_at); emits Expired and exits when hard_expiry passes. Internal TurnFetcher trait + HttpFetcher production impl + StubFetcher test impl keep HTTP off the unit-test path. 6 refresh-loop tests (success-before-half-life, backoff-to-expired, recover-after-one-failure, trigger-now-wakes-immediately, clean-shutdown, trigger-after-expired-returns-err). WebRtcChannel::restart_ice wiring DEFERRED to Phase 3/5 per teammate instructions; T-21 only produces outcomes via channel, Phase 5's P2PTransport will consume. T-22 (mxdx-awe.11, commit b2f36a4): crates/mxdx-p2p/tests/turn_smoke.rs with #[ignore = "requires TEST_HS_URL and TEST_TOKEN env vars..."] correctly skips in standard cargo test -p mxdx-p2p run (reported as '0 passed; 1 ignored'). crates/mxdx-p2p/README.md documents crate overview, cardinal E2EE rule, CI grep-gate pointer, exact shell recipe for operator smoke run, expected output for both 'TURN provisioned' and 'no TURN' cases, security notes (Debug redacts, token only in env var, never checked in). Security review: zero tracing/log/println calls in turn.rs src (Grep-verified); no cred leak via persistence (no Serialize derive, no file I/O); Drop zeroizes username/password/uris on drop; redirect::Policy::none() + 10s timeout cap bearer-token exfiltration; scripts/check-no-unencrypted-sends.sh green. Pre-existing mxdx-types::keychain_chain test failure unrelated (phase-2 scope did not touch). Commits: 90f368c (T-20), cfa03e0 (T-21), b2f36a4 (T-22). Verified: cargo test -p mxdx-p2p — 24 turn tests + 11 crypto + 4 vectors + 1 trybuild + 1 ignored smoke, all pass; cargo check -p mxdx-p2p --target wasm32-unknown-unknown clean; cargo check --workspace --exclude mxdx-core-wasm clean. Phase 3 (WebRtcChannel trait + native impl) can now depend on TurnCredentials shape and TurnRefreshTask outcome channel for subsequent restart_ice wiring.
